nasb.text: So he shepherded them according to the integrity of his heart, And guided them with his skillful hands.

esv.text: With upright heart he shepherded them and guided them with his skillful hand.

cnv.text: 於是大衛以正直的心牧養他們， 靈巧地引導他們。

ccb.text: 于是，大卫以正直的心牧养他们， 用灵巧的手带领他们。

csbs.text: 于是大卫就以纯全的心牧养他们， 以聪慧的手引导他们。
